title: DfE update 19 November 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action Record your T Level data correctly   Action Adult skills fund performance management review – December 2025   Information Ensure your IT support is meeting your needs and providing value for money   Information International fraud awareness week  17 to 21 November     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Action Record your T Level data correctly   Information National funding formula for 2026 to 2027   Information Ensure your IT support is meeting your needs and providing value for money   Information Explore new features on Plan technology for your school   Information International fraud awareness week  17 to 21 November   Events and webinars Academies chart of accounts and automation Question and Answer drop-in session   Events and webinars Academies chart of accounts and automation Question and Answer drop-in session   Events and webinars DfE Energy for schools webinar   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Action Record your T Level data correctly   Action Adult skills fund performance management review – December 2025   Information National funding formula for 2026 to 2027   Information Ensure your IT support is meeting your needs and providing value for money   Information Explore new features on Plan technology for your school   Information International fraud awareness week  17 to 21 November   Events and webinars DfE Energy for schools webinar    "
